---
name: Specification issue
about: Report a problem, ambiguity, or gap in an EASRA specification (001–010)
title: "[SPEC] "
labels: ["specification"]
---

## Specification and section

*Which spec (001–010) and which section? e.g. "Spec 005 §L6.4 — Design principles".*

## Problem

*What is unclear, contradictory, missing, or wrong?*

## Proposed direction (optional)

*If you have a proposed fix, describe it here. Structural changes (layer boundary, interface, principle, trust boundary) require an ADR — see [`GOVERNANCE.md`](../../GOVERNANCE.md).*

## Impact

- [ ] Editorial (typo, formatting, link)
- [ ] Clarification (no semantic change)
- [ ] Additive (new material)
- [ ] Structural (layer / interface / principle / trust boundary)  →  ADR required

## References

*Standards, prior art, links to related discussions.*
